name: NanoClaw
description: A lightweight AI assistant that runs agents securely in containers. Connects to WhatsApp, has memory, scheduled jobs. Works with Anthropic, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible API.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key - Anthropic key OR your provider's key (OpenRouter, etc.)

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.description: API base URL (leave empty for Anthropic, or use: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, https://api.together.xyz/v1, http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)

ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Additional auth token for certain providers (rarely needed)

CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Claude Code OAuth token (optional - for Claude Code integration)

ASSISTANT_NAME.description: Name of your AI assistant (used as trigger word)

ASSISTANT_HAS_OWN_NUMBER.description: Set to 'true' if the assistant has its own WhatsApp number

MAX_CONCURRENT_CONTAINERS.description: Maximum number of concurrent agent containers

IDLE_TIMEOUT.description: Idle timeout before closing container in milliseconds

_volumeNote: Railway does not auto-provision volumes from templates. Users must create these volumes manually via the dashboard or CLI after deployment. See QUICKSTART.md.
